description: Creates a separate file for each column specified from the input file
author: GenePattern Team
plan:
## SplitColumns GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
SplitColumns is a GenePattern module that Creates a separate file for each column specified from the input file

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 4 parameters:
- Required: input.file, split.columns, output.prefix
- Optional: additional.columns

### 3. Command Line
```
<perl> <libdir>splitcolumns.pl -i <input.file> <split.columns> <additional.columns> -o <output.prefix>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: split.columns
parameters.description: Specify columns to extract (i.e. 2,4, 5-, 11-17,). Leave blank to split all columns.

parameters.name: additional.columns
parameters.description: Specify subset of additional columns to include in each (i.e. 2,4, 5-, 11-17) output file.

parameters.name: output.prefix
parameters.description: The prefix to use for the output file name.
